events.title: Birth of Siddhartha Gautama
events.description: Born in Lumbini (modern Nepal) as Prince Siddhartha.

events.title: Enlightenment under the Bodhi Tree
events.description: Attained Buddhahood at Bodh Gaya after overcoming Mara.

events.title: First Sermon — Dhammacakkappavattana
events.description: Set in motion the Wheel of Dhamma at Deer Park, Sarnath.

events.title: Mahaparinirvana
events.description: Final passing of the Buddha at Kushinagar.

events.title: First Buddhist Council
events.description: Recitation of the Buddha's teachings at Rajagaha under Mahakassapa.

events.title: Second Buddhist Council
events.description: Held at Vaishali — early monastic discipline discussions.

events.title: Third Buddhist Council
events.description: Patronized by Emperor Ashoka at Pataliputra.
